active_projects.completion_summary: Removed deprecated index.md files from both .claude/ and .opencode/ context directories. The context-index-migration.md guide was updated to reflect the completed migration.
active_projects.claudemd_suggestions: Updated 35 files in .claude/ and .opencode/ to change index.md references to index.json. Key changes: agents/general-implementation-agent.md, agents/meta-builder-agent.md, skills/skill-orchestrator/SKILL.md, skills/skill-git-workflow/SKILL.md, docs/guides/context-loading-best-practices.md, context/core/schemas/subagent-frontmatter.yaml, context/core/templates/agent-template.md, and migration guide. Deleted .claude/context/index.md and .opencode/context/index.md.
